import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(text)
    let trimmed = string.trim(text)
    match string.parse_int(trimmed)
    when Some(score)
      if score >= 90
        println("A")
      else if score >= 75
        println("B")
      else if score >= 60
        println("C")
      else
        println("F")
      end
    when None
      println("F")
    end
  when None
    println("F")
  end
end
